summary: Comprehensive testing of WaveWatch streaming platform iteration 2. All 7 orphaned pages wired to router + 3 new pages (Music, Games, WatchHistory) + navigation dropdowns + protected routes are working correctly. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All 28 UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and trending movies from TMDB
Navigation 'Contenu' dropdown shows all 10 items: Films, Series, Animes, Sport, Documentaires, Spectacles, Collections, Acteurs, Ebooks, Logiciels
Navigation 'Medias' dropdown shows all 7 items: Chaines TV, Radio FM, Musique, Retrogaming, Jeux, Decouvrir des Playlists, Demandes de contenu
Desktop nav has Calendrier and VIP links
/movies page loads with 41 movie cards and TMDB data
/tv-shows page loads with TV shows grid
/anime page loads with anime grid
/search page loads with search input
/calendar page loads with upcoming releases calendar
/sport page loads with live section and sports content
/documentaires page loads with documentary grid
/spectacles page loads with spectacle cards
/actors page loads with 21 TMDB popular persons
/vip-game page loads with VIP wheel game
/changelogs page shows version history
/music page loads with 4 playlists and player
/games page loads with 8 game cards
/history page shows login prompt for unauthenticated users
/login page loads correctly
/register page loads correctly
Admin login with admin@wavewatch.com / WaveWatch2026! works
After login, user menu shows: Tableau de bord, Mes favoris, Historique, Mes playlists, Profil
Protected routes /dashboard accessible when authenticated
Protected routes /profile accessible when authenticated
Protected routes /favorites accessible when authenticated
Protected routes /dashboard redirect to /login when not authenticated
Protected routes /profile redirect to /login when not authenticated
Footer contains all links: Ecrire au staff, DNS & VPN, FAQ, Demandes, Nouveautes
critical_code_review_comments: Sport, Spectacles, Documentaires, Music, Games pages use STATIC/MOCKED data (no TMDB integration) - this is expected per requirements
Calendar and Actors pages correctly fetch from TMDB API
WatchHistory page correctly shows login prompt for unauthenticated users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All navigation flows, pages, and protected routes are working. TMDB integration is functional for movies, TV shows, anime, actors, and calendar. Static data pages (Sport, Spectacles, Documentaires, Music, Games) are working as expected with hardcoded content. Auth flow with cookies and localStorage is working correctly.
mocked_apis_note: Sport, Spectacles, Documentaires, Music, and Games pages use STATIC/HARDCODED data (no backend API calls). This is by design per the requirements.
